# Category: cloud_compute_security

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion : "2010-09-09"
Description: SampleTemplate
Transform : AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      EnableDnsSupport : true 
      EnableDnsHostnames : true 
  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone : "us-east-1a"
      VpcId : !Ref VPC
